label: instance of
description: that class of which this item is a particular example and member

label: subclass of
description: this class is a subset (subclass) of that class

label: has
description: generic link from one individual to another (e.g. an MP has a speech)

label: has transcript
description: URL of the MediaWiki page holding the full transcript text

label: has media file
description: media file (image or video) stored on the wiki and linked to the item

label: has message
description: verbatim text of a short social media message

label: publication date
description: date (and time) the item was published or recorded

label: has sentiment
description: overall sentiment score from a lexicon-based analysis (-10 to +10)

label: mentions
description: an entity (person or organisation) named in the text of the item
